title: Zinc Rallies As Another European Smelter Closed Due To Energy Crisis
section_path: Zinc Rallies As Another European Smelter Closed Due To Energy Crisis
section_path_text: Zinc Rallies As Another European Smelter Closed Due To Energy Crisis
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodities edged lower as weaker than expected economic data raised concerns about weaker demand. This was partly offset by supply disruptions due to high energy prices. Zinc rallied after high energy costs in Europe forced further smelter closures.
